name: gotcha-memory
description: Personal gotcha memory for Claude Code — never re-debug the same wall twice.

plugins.name: gotcha-memory
plugins.description: Saves the hard-won fixes you discover and proactively injects the relevant ones into context before you hit the same wall again. Local-first and private by default — nothing leaves your machine. Ships with a small starter set. Capture with the remember-gotcha skill; injection is automatic on every prompt.
